items.title: Three men guilty of 'callous' Brighton beach rape
items.description: The men, who are all asylum seekers, had denied targeting the woman in the early hours of October 4.

items.title: No Fifa plan for Italy to replace Iran at World Cup
items.description: Fifa stands by comments made last week by president Gianni Infantino in which he said that "the Iranian team is coming, for sure".

items.title: Prince Louis holiday video released to mark eighth birthday
items.description: The footage was filmed by photographer Matt Porteous in Cornwall earlier this month.

items.title: Knife killings down by 21% in England and Wales, figures show
items.description: The annual ONS crime data also shows overall recorded homicides have fallen.
